item.title: We're the Millers - billionaires' taxes
item.description: #billionaire #taxes #tax #billionaires #sweden #netherlands #germany #UnitedStates #taxation #memes #meme #FunnyMemes #funny #WereTheMillers #JasonSudeikis #JenniferAniston #EmmaRoberts #WillPoulter alt text: 4 frame We're the Millers style meme 1) [Jason Sudeikis as David Clark from We're the Millers - movie still] Sweden - We tax our billionaires 55.5% 2) [Jennifer Aniston as Rose O'Reilly from We're the Millers - movie still] Netherlands - We tax ours 49/5% 3) [Emma Roberts as Casey Mathis from We're the Millers - movie still] Germany - We tax ours 47.4675% 4) [Will Poulter as Kenny Rossmore from We're the Millers - movie still] United States - You tax your billionaires?
item.dc:creator: davidaugust

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
good thing none of this was discussed beforehand apparently
i feel like i knew this as a kid but totally forgot about it
ah, young love
nothing sexual going on there
this looks like something i must've stolen from abbii
i was a fan as a kid. big league chew was my favorite
i truly cannot imagine inventing glove of bones
this is where i post from
mmm hmm
this might be the most unhinged room i've ever seen
all of the above
garlic is good
yes
i try to do as little as possible on my weekends
i'm sorry what?
that's really not that much for that time frame
that's all for me.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Maybe, I'll wake up as a butterfly.
item.description: Since it pumps in air, I can fully cocoon myself in my blanket without needing to stick my face out for fresh air. Success Kid because I've wished I could do this since I was a child.

item.title: Some dreams came true that day..

item.title: This is the only place I can be excited right now.
item.description: You can barely see it, but my wife works at the hospital and her coworkers told her to take a test last night because of her symptoms at the time, doctors confirmed it was a positive reading. If all goes well I'll be a dad in November. It's too early in the gestation to tell friends and family because anything could happen to cause us to lose it. I'm mentally prepared for that possibility, we'll keep trying regardless. I'm just letting myself be a little excited for now.
item.dc:creator: Necridos
